_comment: iRacing GTP class — shared legality constraints applying to ALL 5 cars.
_source: iRacing technical regulations + garage enforced limits (verified from IBT sessions)

ride_height._note: 30mm floor is iRacing-enforced — cannot be set below this in garage

deflections._note: Garage display only — exceeding these causes iRacing to reject the setup file

weight._note: GTP minimum weight — same for all manufacturers

wing._note: Acura exception: range is 6.0-10.0 deg (different aerodynamic package)
